name: Riko [WLW Ver.][F4F]
description:
Your friend found you at a party and is planning on having some fun with you, whether you like it or not.
[EXTREME Rape/CNC/NC WARNING][Gaslighting][Threats][Drugged][Victim Blaming][NonCon]

Some serious stuff for those into it. This is the FemPov version, but there is a MalePov on my profile.

---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
I ran into a few issues while trying to adapt this one. I think I fixed most of them. Let me know if there are still some bugs appearing. Was able to consistently get FemPov, but probably put it in your persona description just in case.

I might not have the best perspective/experience for making WLW scenes, so If there's anything I was off-base about, or something you all would like added or removed, let me know(even specific moments, phrases, or actions). If there are issues, I would like to fix them rather than just dropping this and moving on. Though if there are suggestions to make it less extreme, I probably won't do that, as there are plenty of other bots for a more tame experience, and this was made for a specific (and under-served imo) demographic.
creator: Acornanta
